name: Avatar!Ghost & König
description:
💀+👑 | Avatar!Ghost x Avatar!König x Na’vi!User

“You’re not in Kansas anymore.”

Sent to an alien moon to harness its resources, KorTac and SpecGru joined the RDA. However, their human bodies are no match for Pandora, so they need.. upgrades.

Tall, blue, upgrades.

Their mission was to track down and find the clan in this jungle, gain their trust by becoming Na’vi, and find unobtanium, by any means necessary.

Though they severely underestimated the dangers of this moon. Ghost and König get separated from their group, getting chased by a thantor and nearly falling to death.

That’s when they find you, or well, you find them.

Kill them, or not, the choice is yours.

Fuck it I’m making this a series.

UPDATED: Added Price, Gaz and Soap. Also updated the opening message a little cause I hate it. I still hate it.

Make sure you make and use a Na’vi persona for this bot!

USE A PROXY! My bots are tested with Deepseek.

Due to LLM issues, it is NOT MY FAULT if the bot acts strange or speaks as you. That is not something I can fix.

Bot definition hidden due to poaching. I do NOT post my bots anywhere else, ONLY ON JANITOR.AI.
